graphiti.mcpServerUrl.label: Graphiti MCP Server URL
graphiti.mcpServerUrl.help: URL of the Graphiti MCP server for knowledge graph storage

graphiti.groupId.label: Graph Group ID
graphiti.groupId.help: Namespace for isolating knowledge graphs per user/project

evolution.enabled.label: Skill Evolution
evolution.enabled.help: Automatically refine skills based on errors and user corrections

evolution.approvalPolicy.label: Approval Policy
evolution.approvalPolicy.help: Whether to always apply evolutions or ask for approval first

evolution.maxEntriesPerRound.label: Max Evolutions Per Round
evolution.maxEntriesPerRound.help: Maximum skill improvements generated per conversation round

nudge.enabled.label: Learning Nudge
nudge.enabled.help: Periodically review conversations to persist knowledge

nudge.memoryInterval.label: Memory Nudge Interval
nudge.memoryInterval.help: Number of turns between memory reviews

nudge.skillInterval.label: Skill Nudge Interval
nudge.skillInterval.help: Number of turns between skill reviews

memory.autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
memory.autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant knowledge from the graph before agent starts

memory.autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
memory.autoCapture.help: Automatically extract and store knowledge from conversations
